title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 6–9, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A... a former Admiral... With the und-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's almost Dawn, and nobody's shown up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: After hearing you threaten Doflamingoo like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: There's no way I can rest easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If you'd just listen!! Cut it out!!

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
